data.title: Hina
data.synopsis:
The "highly entertaining action drama" is set in Izu, Japan, where men are fighting over a woman called Hina. What is it exactly that makes Hina mislead men? As the men try to reveal their true feelings for Hina, strong, muscly men also get involved and the sound of the festival drum signals the start of a confrontation. 

(Source: Variety, edited)

data.synopsis:
A banquet was planned for honored guests, everyone got an errand for this auspicious fest. Aak would cook and Waai Fu should greet, and Hung went to Jaye for some freshly caught fins. The time to feast finally arrived, yet the guests... had no place to dine.

(Source: Crunchyroll)

titles.title: ガールズバンドクライ

data.title: Girls Band Cry
data.title_japanese: ガールズバンドクライ
data.synopsis:
Everyone yearns to find their true purpose in life. This is also true for Nina Iseri, a 17-year-old girl looking to enroll in a good university, but the world always seems to work against her. On her very first day in Tokyo, she gets lost, ignored, and locked out of her new apartment. However, an unexpected opportunity arises when Nina meets Momoka Kawaragi, one of her favorite guitarists.

After Nina joins Momoka for a street performance, Momoka decides they should start a band together. While Nina initially hesitates, her determination grows as they start acquiring more bandmates—the beautiful drummer Subaru Awa, the aloof keyboardist Tomo Ebizuka, and the intelligent bassist Rupa. The five girls face challenges both in the music industry and within themselves, but their shared passion for music never lets them give up on their dreams.

[Written by MAL Rewrite]

titles.title: The Concierge at Arctic Department Store
北極百貨店のコンシェルジュさん

data.title: Hokkyoku Hyakkaten no Concierge-san
data.title_japanese: 北極百貨店のコンシェルジュさん
title_synonyms: The Concierge at Arctic Department Store
data.synopsis:
Akino has finally gotten her dream job as a concierge at the fabulous Hokkyoku department store. The expansive store provides a luxury retail experience to customers of all shapes, sizes, and even species! In fact, Hokkyoku is proud to be the only store capable of serving Very Important Animals (VIAs)—extinct species that have managed to find their way to the retailer.

Akino's job as a concierge is to make sure that every customer has a smooth and enjoyable visit. However, with customers requesting discontinued products and needing help with marriage proposals, she has her work cut out for her. If she wants to impress her new boss, she will have to work hard and be more than a little imaginative in her solutions.

[Written by MAL Rewrite]
data.background: Hokkyoku Hyakkaten no Concierge-san was released on Blu-ray in North America as The Concierge by Crunchyroll on August 12, 2025.
